info.title: Sofascore Local Multi-Sport API
info.description:
Local OpenAPI contract for the multi-sport read API backed by the current PostgreSQL dataset. Paths mirror Sofascore-style templates already used by the ingestion layer. Normalized endpoints expose typed schemas where we have stable tables, while snapshot-first endpoints remain intentionally flexible.

Generated at: 2026-04-15T15:29:43+00:00
Tables with data in summary: 0
Raw snapshot rows: 0

servers.description: Recommended base URL for the future local multi-sport API server

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Sport-specific category and tournament discovery endpoints.

tags.name: Event Detail
tags.description: Event detail, lineups, odds, managers, h2h and other event subresources.

tags.name: Standings
tags.description: Standings and standings rows by unique tournament or tournament.

tags.name: Statistics
tags.description: Season statistics config and leaderboard-style snapshot results.

tags.name: Entities
tags.description: Player/team entities, player season statistics and enrichment endpoints.

tags.name: Leaderboards
tags.description: Top players, top teams, venues, groups, team-of-the-week and related season widgets.

- Target table: `unique_tournament`

- Target table: `season`

get.description:
Featured event feed for one unique tournament.

- Target table: `event`

Event list for one tournament season round.

- Target table: `event`

Normalized event detail record for one football event.

- Target table: `event`

Home and away lineups, players and missing players for one event.

- Target table: `event_lineup`

Manager assignments for the home and away side of one event.

- Target table: `event_manager_assignment`

Team and manager duel aggregates for one event.

- Target table: `event_duel`

Pregame form block for the home and away side.

- Target table: `event_pregame_form`

Fan vote distributions for one event.

- Target table: `event_vote_option`

Minute-by-minute match commentary and kit colors for one event.

- Target table: `event_comment`

Stored momentum graph points for one event.

- Target table: `event_graph`

Stored event heatmap points for one team inside one event.

- Target table: `event_team_heatmap`

All stored odds markets for one event/provider combination.

- Target table: `event_market`

Featured odds markets for one event/provider combination.

- Target table: `event_market`

Stored winning-odds projection for home and away sides.

- Target table: `event_winning_odds`

Latest stored raw point-by-point payload for one tennis event.

- Target table: `api_payload_snapshot`

Latest stored raw tennis-power payload for one tennis event.

- Target table: `api_payload_snapshot`

Standings projection by unique tournament season and scope.

- Target table: `standing`

Standings projection by concrete tournament season and scope.

- Target table: `standing`

Statistics configuration for a tournament season, including teams, group definitions and nationalities.

- Target table: `season_statistics_config`

Leaderboard-style season statistics snapshots. Query parameters intentionally mirror Sofascore grammar.

- Target table: `season_statistics_snapshot`

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset used by the original Sofascore query.

parameters.name: accumulation
parameters.description: Accumulation mode, for example total or per90.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Optional list of exact Sofascore field names.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Optional list of exact Sofascore filter expressions.
